everyone.name: Niki Manoledaki
everyone.bio: Niki Manoledaki is a senior software engineer, environmental sustainability advocate, keynote speaker, and community facilitator. Her work focuses on managing cloud resources efficiently as part of the platform engineering team at Grafana Labs and as a co-chair of the CNCF Environmental Sustainability TAG's Green Reviews Working Group.

everyone.name: Prithvi Raj
everyone.bio: Prithvi Raj is working as a Community Manager & Developer Advocate at Mirantis and is leading the community efforts for the Open Source Program Office at Mirantis including the k0s project, k0smortron, and the other OSS projects Mirantis is contributing to. He previously led the LitmusChaos project community, the CNCF incubating project based on Cloud-Native Chaos Engineering, and has helped scale a community of 3000+ folks from scratch. He is also a CNCF Ambassador and has closely worked with the CNCF community to run LFX Mentorship programs and helped build a Chaos Engineering community in the CNCF ecosystem. He has worked on global events, conferences, and meetups such as Chaos Carnival, Kubernetes Community Days Bengaluru & Chennai, CNCF Kubernetes Chaos Engineering Meetups, and more to help grow various communities in the DevOps ecosystem. He started his journey in 2020 at MayaData and has been passionately helping build the Chaos Engineering community since, being part of ChaosNative and previously Harness. Why I am excited to be an ambassador: I am excited to represent the k0s as a CNCF ambassador and to also work with fellow ambassadors in helping curate more resources, events, and opportunities for the broader community. As an ambassador, I hope to take forward the cloud-native values amongst various folks keen on joining the ecosystem. I also look forward to learning a lot on this journey from my fellow ambassadors.

everyone.name: Toru Komatsu
everyone.bio: Toru contributes to OSS as an individual contributor. He is the author and lead developer of youki, an OCI Runtime in Rust, and I am also a maintainer of the OCI Runtime Specification. Additionally, he serves as a reviewer for runwasi and is involved in developing a world that utilizes containers and Wasm. Lately, he has developed an interest in Kubernetes schedulers. Furthermore, he has given presentations at KubeDay Japan and has spoken at various community events in Japan.Why I am excited to be an ambassador: The area of container runtime is the unsung hero of the Cloud Native space, where the intricacies of the technology and new features often don't get the spotlight they deserve. As a developer in this field, I want to help more people become aware of the exciting features it has to offer. I aim to encourage them to take the leap into this fascinating domain! I am also looking forward to assisting the Japanese Cloud Native community in becoming more vibrant on an international level.

everyone.name: Hemalatha Rambabu
everyone.bio: Solutions Architect with deep expertise in Kubernetes and AWS. Passionate about cloud-native technologies, infrastructure as code, and secure architecture design.

everyone.name: Anh Tuấn Phạm
everyone.bio: I am a results-oriented DevOps Engineer with extensive experience in cloud computing, automation, and infrastructure management. Passionate about leveraging modern technologies, I focus on optimizing operations, strengthening security, and improving efficiency. With a solid foundation in Cloud Native Architecture, I remain dedicated to continuous learning and actively contribute to the tech community through open-source projects and knowledge sharing.

everyone.name: Vino Alex
everyone.bio: I am a technologist with over 20 years of exceptional contributions to the IT industry, specializing in Cloud-Native solutions, Application modernization, Machine Learning, and Digital transformation initiatives.I possess deep expertise in Cloud Native technologies, focusing on OpenShift, Kubernetes, and service mesh, and a comprehensive understanding of leading public cloud platforms.  You may find some of my passionate ramblings at https://vinothecloudone.medium.com/

ambassadors.name: Niki Manoledaki
ambassadors.bio: Niki Manoledaki is a senior software engineer, environmental sustainability advocate, keynote speaker, and community facilitator. Her work focuses on managing cloud resources efficiently as part of the platform engineering team at Grafana Labs and as a co-chair of the CNCF Environmental Sustainability TAG's Green Reviews Working Group.

ambassadors.name: Jintao Zhang
ambassadors.bio: Jintao is a Sr. SE at Kong Inc. Kubernetes Ingress-NGINX maintainer. Microsoft MVP. Public speaker and author. He was speaking at multiple conferences, including KCD, IstioCon, DockerCon, and more. He enjoys sharing technology and has been actively involved in open-source projects for a long time.

ambassadors.name: Manikandan Krishnamurthy
ambassadors.bio: Strategic and results-driven GCP Architect with 6+ years of specialized experience in Google Cloud Platform (GCP), complemented by a total of 15+ years in the IT industry. Proven expertise in designing and implementing robust cloud solutions. Passionate about knowledge sharing and actively contributes to the cloud community through workshops, mentorship, and content creation. As an organizer of the Cloud Native Chennai community for the past 4 years, I have led numerous initiatives, fostering a vibrant and collaborative community. Profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/manikandank276/

ambassadors.name: Alvin Estrada
ambassadors.bio: Tech and Community lover with more than 10 years of experience playing with software professionally. Engaged in cloud native since 2017 when he began learning about Kubernetes, it served as his gateway to the world of tech meetups. Since then, he has actively participated in and collaborated with multiple tech communities in Guatemala and across Latin America Actively collaborating with: Cloud Native Latam - CNCF Group Kubernetes Guatemala - CNCF Group Cloud Native Guatemala - CNCF Group Kong Meetup Guatemala TensorFlow User Group Guatemala.Why I am excited to be an ambassador: Since I first started learning about tech, the community has played a significant role, and being part of a Cloud Native meetup I've been able to see how it creates great opportunities to meet people, learn from their experiences, get inspired and inspire others! I strongly believe that the community movement can make a difference specially on my region, helping us not just to improve our technical skills but also in how we interact, create and learn together.

ambassadors.name: Ronald Kers
ambassadors.bio: A seasoned IT professional with over 22 years of experience, starting as a Windows systems administrator. I now co-host De Nederlandse Kubernetes Podcast, delivering accessible Kubernetes insights to both beginners and experienced IT professionals in the Netherlands. I'm actively involved in CNCF initiatives, organizing and speaking at meetups, and hosts community events like Kubernetes Community Days.

ambassadors.name: Paula Kennedy
ambassadors.bio: Paula is part of the organising committee for Kubernetes Community Days UK, DevOpsDays London, FastFlowConf, and the London Platform User Group. In her day job, Paula is Co-Founder and Chief Operating Officer of Syntasso. She is passionate about community, diversity and inclusion, enjoys speaking at events like KubeCon and also cohosted the first Platform Engineering colocated day at KubeCon Paris. In her spare time, Paula enjoys walking her dog and attempting to run half-marathons.

ambassadors.name: Max Körbächer
ambassadors.bio: Max Körbächer is the Founder and Chief Technology Advisor at Liquid Reply. He is serving as a CNCF Ambassador, a member of the Linux Foundation Europe Advisory Board, and Founder and Emeritus Lead of the former CNCF Environmental Sustainability TAG.His expertise centers on Platform Engineering, which he uses to simplify complex systems in the cloud and AI space, a topic he details in his book, Platform Engineering for Architects. Max is also a dedicated community leader, notably organizing the Cloud Native Days (formerly KCD) in Munich & Ukraine, and the Kubernetes & Cloud Native Meetup in Munich.

ambassadors.name: Aditya Soni
ambassadors.bio: DevOps & Cloud Engineer, Public Speaker, Tech Mentor, Lead Organizer CNCG Jaipur, OpenSource & Community Contributor, AWS Community Builder, AWS Community Leader, 1 x (AWS, GCP, Azure), 6 x RedHat, CKA, KCNA certified.Why I am excited to be an ambassador: It's been more than three years, I am being part of CNCF programs actively contributing via blogs, and public speaking on different open source DevOps/Cloud technologies at virtual and in-person events, I want to expand my learning and contribution with a wide area of peoples and uplift them with like-minded folks I can grow at the same time can share & help with my ideas to build better community bonding & culture.

kubestronauts.name: Hemalatha Rambabu
kubestronauts.bio: Solutions Architect with deep expertise in Kubernetes and AWS. Passionate about cloud-native technologies, infrastructure as code, and secure architecture design.

kubestronauts.name: R Narendran
kubestronauts.bio: Hiya Everyone! 👋 I'm an Experienced Site Reliability Engineer & Full-Lifecycle Architect specializing in multi-cloud Kubernetes, AI/ML/LLM infrastructure and proficient in multiplatform fullstack development for rapid delivery. I love exploring new tech, highly collaborative and sharing ideas with the community, and building cool stuff in the cloud. I'm always up for good new technical challenges and a great conversation—don't hesitate to reach out!

kubestronauts.name: Carlos Encarnacion
kubestronauts.bio: Hello, my name is Carlos Encarnación. I am an engineer passionate about innovation and emerging technologies. Throughout my career, I have gained extensive knowledge and experience, and my greatest aspiration is to continue growing and exploring within this fascinating field. Embracing new challenges in this domain is, without a doubt, my passion and my preferred pursuit.

kubestronauts.name: Kimihiko Abe
kubestronauts.bio: I am conducting research and development on data processing infrastructure leveraging Kubernetes and accelerators such as GPUs and FPGAs.Additionally, I am working on Layer 3 network verification technologies utilizing container-based routing technologies.

goldenKubestronauts.name: Mridula Madabhushanam
goldenKubestronauts.bio: I’m Mridula Madabhushanam, currently serving as the Assistant Director of Platform at Patriot Software, where I lead our DevOps, Data and infrastructure teams. My work focuses on building scalable, secure, and automated cloud platforms using Kubernetes on AWS.

goldenKubestronauts.name: Sayed Imran
goldenKubestronauts.bio: I’m Sayed Imran, a DevOps Engineer and Kubestronaut passionate about cloud-native technologies and automation. I specialize in Kubernetes, Istio, and CNCF tools, with multiple cloud certifications in Google Cloud and AWS. I actively contribute to the community through blogs on Medium. I also speak at tech events, including K8SUG meetups sharing insights on Kubernetes, service mesh, and cloud-native architectures.

goldenKubestronauts.name: Alisan Stoll
goldenKubestronauts.bio: I am a software engineer captivated by the power and intricate orchestration of Kubernetes, drawn to the ever-evolving growth of the CNCF ecosystem and its vibrant community."

goldenKubestronauts.name: Nathanael Liechti
goldenKubestronauts.bio: System Engineer. Kubernetes Enthusiast. Born to be cloud-native.
